description: Mock anchor responses for composition alert. image-baseline confirms the app-spawned-shell pattern, BUT the composition rule (100007 co-firing in the playbook) escalates regardless. The agent must not let anchor confirmation override the composition rule.

image-baseline.citation: 847 prior events over 54 days, established ImageMagick → ghostscript shell-out pattern (telemetry-baseline)

_composition_note: Even though image-baseline confirms, the playbook composition rule applies: 100007 (drop-and-exec) co-fired from the same container 3 seconds after the shell event. The agent must escalate regardless of the anchor confirmation. The report should cite both the matched archetype AND the co-firing as the escalation reason.
